originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__k_crcs_1621` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&k_crcs` is never used.
model:
(define-fun __need_malloc_and_calloc () Bool
  false)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun _STDLIB_H () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_70 (Pulse tool vs CSA). k_crcs = someInt at L25 (if(r) branch) is never read after assignment — genuine dead store. No // ERROR at L25, new bug. PC = !_STDLIB_H AND !__need_malloc_and_calloc (library macros only); restrictive !_STDLIB_H makes PC over-constrained. Bug fires in all compilable VERSION_CHECKING=T configs, not just non-standard stdlib states.
